debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ one_to_one (HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A)

proof:
by
  define
  fix X1 : Set A; fix X2 : Set A
  assume h : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2
  have h1 : X1 ⊆ X2 := subset_of_val_image_eq h
  have h2 : X2 ⊆ X1 := subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm
  exact Set.Subset.antisymm h1 h2
successful_attempts:
by
  define
  fix X1 : Set A; fix X2 : Set A
  assume h : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2
  have h1 : X1 ⊆ X2 := subset_of_val_image_eq h
  have h2 : X2 ⊆ X1 := subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm
  exact Set.Subset.antisymm h1 h2
